channel.title: Posts on Nick's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Nick's Blog

item.title: Udemy Courses
item.description: 365 Careers The Complete Finance Manager Course 2022 The Business Intelligence Analyst Course 2022 Python for Finance: Investment Fundamentals & Data Analytics Accounting & Financial Statement Analysis: Complete Training The Complete Financial Analyst Course 2022 R Programming for Statistics and Data Science 2022 Amarnath Reddy Oracle DBA 11g/12c - Database Administration for Junior DBA Abdulhadi Darwish U&P AI - Natural Language Processing (NLP) with Python Al Sweigart Automate the Boring Stuff with Python Programming Andrew Mead The Complete Node.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Greeting! This is an introduction post. This post tests the followings: Hero image is in the same directory as the post. This post should be at top of the sidebar. Post author should be the same as specified in author.yaml file.
